name: Unsplash API
description: Unsplash provides free, high-resolution stock photos contributed by a global community of photographers. Use the API to search for photos by keyword, retrieve photo details with download URLs, browse curated collections and topics, manage collections, and access user portfolios. All photos are free to use under the Unsplash License.

capabilities.name: photos_list
capabilities.description: Fetch a paginated list of editorial photos curated by Unsplash.

capabilities.name: photos_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific photo by its ID, including EXIF data, location, and download links.

capabilities.name: photos_get_random
capabilities.description: Get one or more random photos, optionally filtered by query, collection, topic, or orientation.

capabilities.name: photos_get_statistics
capabilities.description: Retrieve download, view, and like statistics for a specific photo.

capabilities.name: photos_track_download
capabilities.description: Track a photo download event as required by the Unsplash API Terms. Returns the actual download URL.

capabilities.name: photos_update
capabilities.description: Update a photo's metadata including description, tags, location, and EXIF data. Requires write_photos scope.

capabilities.name: search_photos
capabilities.description: Search for photos by keyword query with filtering by orientation, color, and content filter.

capabilities.name: search_collections
capabilities.description: Search for photo collections by keyword query.

capabilities.name: search_users
capabilities.description: Search for Unsplash users by username or name.

capabilities.name: collections_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all public photo collections.

capabilities.name: collections_get
capabilities.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific collection by ID.

capabilities.name: collections_get_photos
capabilities.description: Retrieve photos contained in a specific collection.

capabilities.name: collections_get_related
capabilities.description: Retrieve collections related to a specific collection.

capabilities.name: collections_create
capabilities.description: Create a new photo collection. Requires write_collections scope.

capabilities.name: collections_update
capabilities.description: Update a collection's title, description, or privacy setting. Requires write_collections scope.

capabilities.name: collections_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a collection. Requires write_collections scope.

capabilities.name: collections_add_photo
capabilities.description: Add a photo to a collection. Requires write_collections scope.

capabilities.name: collections_remove_photo
capabilities.description: Remove a photo from a collection. Requires write_collections scope.

capabilities.name: topics_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve available editorial topics.

capabilities.name: topics_get
capabilities.description: Fetch specific topic details by ID or slug.

capabilities.name: topics_get_photos
capabilities.description: Retrieve photos associated with a topic.

capabilities.name: users_get_profile
capabilities.description: Fetch public profile information for a specific user by username.

capabilities.name: users_get_photos
capabilities.description: Retrieve photos uploaded by a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_get_likes
capabilities.description: Retrieve photos a user has liked.

capabilities.name: users_get_collections
capabilities.description: Retrieve collections created by a user.

capabilities.name: users_get_statistics
capabilities.description: Retrieve consolidated download, view, and like statistics for a user.

capabilities.name: me_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

capabilities.name: me_update
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated user's profile details.

capabilities.name: stats_get_total
capabilities.description: Retrieve platform-wide aggregate statistics for Unsplash.

capabilities.name: stats_get_month
capabilities.description: Retrieve platform-wide statistics for the current month.
